compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Implemented + independently reviewed. Pure-stdlib IR<->BPMN serializer: structure->BPMN element types (scriptTask/serviceTask+<rebar:Agent>/exclusiveGateway/subProcess+loop|multiInstance), needs->sequenceFlow, nesting->subprocess; exact config in <rebar:Config> so round-trip is IDENTITY. Deterministic DI auto-layout (never committed). rebar.moddle.json ships the descriptor for extension survival (POC gotcha). Reviewer found no blockers on the Python round-trip; reachable correctness findings ALL fixed+property-tested: XSD child order (extensionElements first), start/end-event re-import no longer fabricates needs, bare subprocess = clear error, needs order preserved, explicit type round-trips. 21 bpmn tests (incl 8 property fixtures), 186 workflow tests pass, ruff clean. DEFERRED to 744b (editor story): synthetic start/end events + per-subprocess DI planes for ideal bpmn-js rendering. Commit f628df05.

compiled_state.description:
## Why
Human visual editing uses an off-the-shelf CONSTRAINED editor (bpmn-js); the only bespoke piece is a thin
IR<->BPMN serializer. De-risked by docs/experiments/workflow-remediation-pocs/visual_bpmn_roundtrip_poc.mjs.

## What
A serializer mapping the v2 IR <-> BPMN 2.0 XML: deterministic step -> scriptTask, agent step -> serviceTask + a
<rebar:Agent> extension (prompt/provider/tools), conditional -> exclusiveGateway, loop -> loop marker, map ->
multiInstanceLoopCharacteristics; stable ids preserved. Register a `rebar` moddle descriptor so extension
elements survive save/copy cycles. Round-trip property fixtures; deterministic auto-layout on open.

## Scope
- a new serializer module (Python projection side) + a moddle descriptor (JS editor side)
Out: the editor UI/launcher (separate story).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] IR -> BPMN -> IR round-trip preserves step ids, agent-step metadata, conditionals, loops, and multi-instance.
- [ ] A registered `rebar` moddle descriptor; extension elements survive save/copy cycles.
- [ ] Round-trip property fixtures in the test suite; deterministic auto-layout generated on open.
compiled_state.title: IR-to-BPMN serializer and rebar moddle extension
